typography.instructions: DO NOT use Inter or Roboto. Use Outfit for all headings to give a geometric, high-tech SaaS feel, and Manrope for maximum readability in body copy. Use JetBrains Mono for any code output or prompt areas.

colors.instructions: Follow the 'Godly' dark mode style. Avoid pure black (#000000). Use deep zinc (#09090B). Use the blue/purple gradient sparingly to highlight key elements (like the Main CTA or 'Generate' button). Use 1px subtle borders (border-white/10) to separate sections.

surfaces_and_glassmorphism.card: bg-zinc-900/20 border border-white/5 rounded-2xl hover:bg-zinc-900/40 transition-colors duration-300
surfaces_and_glassmorphism.input: bg-zinc-950 border border-white/10 rounded-xl focus:border-purple-500/50 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-purple-500/50 transition-all
surfaces_and_glassmorphism.instructions: Never use fully transparent backgrounds for headers or dropdowns. Always apply backdrop-blur-2xl and a 1px border-white/10 to create authentic high-end glassmorphism (like Linear and v0).

buttons.primary: rounded-full bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-purple-600 text-white font-medium px-6 py-2.5 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(139,92,246,0.3)] transition-all transform hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: rounded-full bg-zinc-800 text-zinc-100 font-medium px-6 py-2.5 border border-white/10 hover:bg-zinc-700 transition-all
buttons.ghost: rounded-full text-zinc-400 hover:text-zinc-100 hover:bg-zinc-800/50 transition-all px-4 py-2

navigation.header: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-zinc-950/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10 h-16 flex items-center justify-between px-6

builder_layout.sidebar: w-80 h-[calc(100vh-4rem)] border-r border-white/10 bg-zinc-950/50 flex flex-col p-4
builder_layout.preview_area: flex-1 h-[calc(100vh-4rem)] bg-zinc-900 p-4 rounded-tl-3xl border-t border-l border-white/10 overflow-hidden relative

landing_page.hero: Min-h-screen flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center px-4 relative overflow-hidden. Place abstract purple/blue glowing orbs in the background with strong blur (blur-[100px]).
landing_page.features: Bento Grid layout (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 p-8). Mix large showcase cards (col-span-2) and smaller stat/info cards.

dashboard.structure: Collapsible left sidebar for navigation. Main content area uses a high-density grid for 'My Projects' cards. Header contains User Profile and 'New Project' CTA.

builder_page.structure: Split pane setup. Left pane (300-350px) contains the chat/prompt interface for generating the website. Right pane takes remaining space and holds an iframe or scaled div showing the Live Preview.

motion.hover: All interactive elements must have a smooth hover transition (e.g., transition-all duration-300). Buttons should lift slightly (hover:-translate-y-0.5).
motion.entrance: Use Framer Motion to stagger the entrance of Bento Grid items and list items. Fade in and slide up (initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}).
motion.microinteractions: Provide immediate visual feedback for the 'Generate' button (e.g., a glowing border or loading spinner).

hero_background_texture.description: Abstract composition of colorful light trails in blues and purples. Use this heavily blurred as a background layer in the hero section to create the 'glowing orb' effect.

feature_workspace.description: Close-up of a sleek keyboard and smartphone on a dark workspace. Use in a Bento Grid card to represent the 'Pro Developer Tools' or 'Modern Workflow'.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text meets WCAG AA standards. Muted text (zinc-400) against dark bg (zinc-950) is safe, but avoid zinc-600 for small body text.
accessibility.focus: All form inputs and buttons MUST have visible focus states (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-purple-500/50).
accessibility.data_testid: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='generate-website-button').

universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: Do not use centered text layouts for long paragraphs. Keep reading content left-aligned.
Implement glassmorphism strictly with backdrop-blur and semi-transparent borders.
For the Live Preview, build a stylized 'Browser Window' frame around the iframe to make it feel premium.
Never use pure black (#000) or pure white (#fff) for large surfaces. Use the provided zinc colors.
Use Phosphor Icons or Lucide-React for all icons, keeping a consistent 1.5px stroke width.
Avoid the generic 'AI slop' look by ensuring generous padding (p-8, p-12) and precise 1px borders.
Provide toast notifications using Sonner (e.g., for 'Code Copied to Clipboard' or 'Project Saved').
